case_title: DISCOVER BANK VS. JOHN KAORU MARPLE

docket_entries.description: COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $469.30 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

ORIGINAL NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT AND PROOF OF SERVICE ON APPLICATION AND NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT / PROOF OF SERVICE OF CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET; NTC OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT; APPL FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT ON SISTER-STATE JUDGMENT; DECL RE: INTEREST; DECL PURSUANT TO CCP 395(B): VENUE FOR PERSONAL, FAMILY OR HOUSEHOLD OBLIGATIONS; AND JUDGMENT PURSUAN TTO CCP SECTION 1710.25 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK SERVED AUG-28-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARPLE, JOHN KAORU PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE ON SEP-28-2012 IF NO MOTION FILED BY DEFENDANT
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK AS TO DEFENDANT MARPLE, JOHN KAORU
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
DECLARATION RE: INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARPLE, JOHN KAORU $3,860.64 PRINCIPAL, $2,875.78 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,961.42, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
